payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a durable memory. Please provide a specific fact, preference, project, goal, or instruction related to AI that you want me to remember.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and does not contain a specific durable personal fact, preference, relationship, or instruction to remember.

details: No durable memory was created because the request was overly broad and not personally specific.

repair_options: Specify a personal AI-related preference, e.g., "Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts."
Specify an AI project or goal, e.g., "Remember that I am building an AI note-taking app."
Specify a recurring instruction, e.g., "Remember to explain machine learning topics with practical examples."
